executive_summary.question: What is the punishment for abetting the commission of an offence by the public generally, or by a class of persons exceeding ten?
executive_summary.generated_answer: The punishment for abetting the commission of an offence by the public generally, or by a class of persons exceeding ten, is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years and with fine [Chunk-ID: 90f9986c-9b72-4d18-a9f8-5c536442d5b5].

evidence_analysis.claim_text: The punishment for abetting the commission of an offence exists.
evidence_analysis.supporting_evidence:
Whoever abets the commission of an offence by the public generally or by any
number or class of persons exceeding ten, shall be punished with imprisonment of either
description for a term which may extend to seven years and with fine.
